Uses of Class
recoder.java.Identifier

Packages that use Identifier
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt
This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions.
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.

  • Uses of Identifier in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type Identifier
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProgramElementName
    Recoder2KeYConverter.convert(Identifier id)
    convert a recoder Identifier to a KeY Identifier

  • Uses of Identifier in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

    Subclasses of Identifier in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ExtendedIdentifier
    an extended identifier that accepts hash symbols in its name but not as first character
    class 
    ImplicitIdentifier
    subclasses the recoder Identifier in order to allow fields with special characters.
    class 
    LabelSVWrapper
     
    class 
    ObjectTypeIdentifier
     
    class 
    ProgramVariableSVWrapper

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Identifier
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Identifier child, NamedProgramElement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Identifier child, NamedProgramElement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
